metadata.subject: Arts Education
metadata.description: Advanced students continue ensemble work as members of a professional-level dance company. This course emphasizes artistic leadership, sophisticated performance skills, and preparing for professional dance careers.
metadata.general_description: Advanced ensemble course for professional-level dance company participation.

big_ideas.statement: Professional-level dance companies demand artistic leadership and sophisticated collaborative practice.
big_ideas.elaboration: Grade 12 company members take on leadership roles, mentor less experienced dancers, and contribute to ensemble artistry at advanced levels.

big_ideas.statement: Advanced performers balance individual artistic development with collective ensemble vision.
big_ideas.elaboration: Mature dancers strengthen technical abilities while deepening their understanding of collaborative artistic practice and ensemble cohesion.

big_ideas.statement: Professional dance practice requires commitment to excellence, discipline, and ongoing artistic growth.
big_ideas.elaboration: Grade 12 dancers model professional standards and commitment, developing habits and attitudes essential to sustained dance careers.

big_ideas.statement: Professional dance companies serve important cultural and community roles.
big_ideas.elaboration: Grade 12 company members understand and contribute to their ensemble's mission, audience engagement, and cultural significance.

i_can_statements: I can execute technically and artistically sophisticated choreography
I can maintain professional standards of performance and presence
I can demonstrate artistic maturity and nuanced interpretation
I can perform complex repertoire with confidence and artistry
I can mentor and support developing dancers
I can take on leadership responsibilities in rehearsal and performance
I can help maintain high ensemble standards
I can model professional conduct and artistic commitment

competencies.raw: Develop versatility across diverse choreographic styles
i_can_statements: I can perform skillfully in various choreographic styles
I can adapt quickly to new movement vocabularies
I can expand my artistic range significantly
I can bring personal interpretation to diverse roles

competencies.raw: Contribute to ensemble artistic development and innovation
i_can_statements: I can participate in artistic planning and direction
I can contribute creative ideas to ensemble process
I can help develop new and experimental work
I can support the company's artistic vision and evolution

competencies.raw: Analyze choreography with sophisticated critical understanding
i_can_statements: I can conduct detailed analysis of the choreography I perform
I can understand artistic intent and directorial vision deeply
I can evaluate how my interpretation serves the overall work
I can recognize artistic significance and innovation

competencies.raw: Understand professional ensemble practices and culture
i_can_statements: I can understand organizational structures and operations of professional companies
I can appreciate professional standards and expectations
I can contribute to positive company culture
I can understand business and administrative aspects of dance companies

competencies.raw: Reflect on artistic growth and professional trajectory
i_can_statements: I can evaluate my development as an advanced performer
I can identify my unique artistic voice and contributions
I can reflect on readiness for professional dance career
I can envision long-term artistic and career goals

competencies.raw: Engage with dance history and professional discourse
i_can_statements: I can understand historical and cultural contexts of company repertoire
I can participate in conversations about contemporary dance
I can recognize contributions of diverse dance traditions
I can understand dance's role in society and culture

competencies.raw: Lead and communicate within ensemble environments
i_can_statements: I can communicate with clarity and professionalism
I can give effective guidance and feedback to peers
I can facilitate ensemble discussions and problem-solving
I can advocate for artistic excellence and ensemble well-being

competencies.raw: Perform with artistic presence and audience engagement
i_can_statements: I can perform with sophisticated presence and artistry
I can engage audiences with emotional authenticity
I can maintain focused presence across multiple performances
I can adapt performance based on varying contexts
I can represent the company professionally in public contexts
I can participate in audience engagement and outreach
I can discuss company mission and work meaningfully
I can contribute to company's public image and reputation

competencies.raw: Document and archive company and personal work
i_can_statements: I can help maintain professional archives of company work
I can document rehearsals and performances effectively
I can preserve choreographic material accurately
I can contribute to company's historical record

competencies.raw: Engage with diverse dance practices and traditions
i_can_statements: I can learn from diverse choreographic traditions
I can respect and authentically engage with cultural practices
I can contribute to culturally responsive ensemble practice
I can appreciate global dance perspectives

competencies.raw: Understand professional dance field and career opportunities
i_can_statements: I can navigate professional dance world and opportunities
I can understand diverse career pathways in dance
I can develop professional networks and relationships
I can assess readiness for professional dance careers

competencies.raw: Connect company work to broader artistic and cultural contexts
i_can_statements: I can understand company's cultural role and mission
I can participate in company's community engagement
I can recognize company's contribution to artistic discourse
I can understand company's role in cultural preservation or innovation
I can develop commitment to lifelong artistic practice
I can create realistic plan for professional development
I can understand challenges and rewards of dance careers
I can prepare for transitions beyond this ensemble experience

areas.name: Advanced Performance and Artistic Development
topics: Complex rehearsal processes and refined technique
Ensemble cohesion and advanced performance skills

areas.name: Ensemble Leadership and Collaboration
topics: Contributing to artistic planning and direction

areas.name: Professional Dance Practice
topics: Professional standards and expectations in dance companies
Health, wellness, and injury prevention at professional level

areas.name: Career Preparation and Professional Development
topics: Planning transition to professional dance career
